claim_status: No-claim upstream source observations only; official project documentation is not a selected source baseline, dependency approval, reproducibility proof, legal approval, component approval, or release-code authorization.

sources.title: Servo source repository
sources.observation: The public repository exposes Cargo.lock, rust-toolchain.toml, mach bootstrap/build tooling, platform-specific prerequisites, and multiple source/build control files.
sources.decision_consequence: A candidate baseline must identify the exact revision and toolchain inputs; a repository URL or moving branch is insufficient source identity.

sources.title: Servo live repository metadata and refs
sources.observation: A read-only capture observed public, non-archived Servo with default branch main, MPL-2.0 API license metadata, head commit f542a355e5565e380aa0570132d4138dde328bae, pushedAt 2026-07-20T03:24:57Z, updatedAt 2026-07-20T03:53:53Z, and latest release v0.3.0 published 2026-06-25 at tag commit fb6c9d511f67a311f5883ec859aa0c5dd88d19c3. The head and latest release are different identities, and the head changed since the prior 2026-07-19 capture.
sources.decision_consequence: The decision must select and pin one source identity, record whether it is a moving head or release/tag object, and rerun equivalence, build, dependency, compatibility, performance, security, and maintenance evidence when the selected identity changes.

sources.title: Servo mozjs live repository metadata and head
sources.observation: A read-only capture observed public, non-archived servo/mozjs with default branch main and head commit f5cbf8aa6076064fd658a1e9fb16147c2347affb; repository pushedAt 2026-07-19T19:30:00Z, updatedAt 2026-07-19T19:30:03Z, and latest release mozjs-sys-v140.12.0-2 published 2026-07-10. The repository API returned null SPDX license metadata and no security-policy URL; those fields are unresolved metadata observations, not proof of absent licensing or security practice.
sources.decision_consequence: The JavaScript-runtime option must pin mozjs independently from Servo, inspect repository license/security files and release identity, retain the exact ref, hash, and freshness metadata, and resolve provenance, runtime, Web IDL, identity, debugger, Test262, and maintenance consequences before any source or component approval.

sources.title: Getting the code
sources.observation: The documented starting point is cloning the Servo repository, with shallow clone guidance framed as a network/storage option rather than a provenance decision.
sources.decision_consequence: The replay packet must retain the exact commit, fetch mode, object availability, and independent verification result.

sources.title: Building offline
sources.observation: Servo documents vendored source archives for source plus Rust dependencies, while Windows and macOS still require additional bootstrap dependencies; prebuilt SpiderMonkey artifacts are a separate optional input with GitHub attestation verification guidance.
sources.decision_consequence: Git trees, vendored archives, platform bootstrap assets, and prebuilt native artifacts must be modeled as separate inputs and compared or approved explicitly.

sources.title: Crate dependencies
sources.observation: Cargo.lock records exact revisions for Git dependencies, and the documented dependency workflow includes explicit update commands and local patching behavior.
sources.decision_consequence: Lockfile revision pinning improves replay identity but does not replace source, license, build-script, proc-macro, native-package, or advisory review.

sources.title: January in Servo: pinned Git dependencies
sources.observation: The project reported pinning Git dependencies to specific revisions to reduce build failures and described a future goal of forbidding Git dependencies in Servo libraries.
sources.decision_consequence: The observation is useful maintenance context only; Turing still needs a selected baseline, complete dependency closure, and owner-reviewed policy for Git and registry sources.

unsupported: No owner-selected ADR-0009 source baseline exists.
No Git-tree, vendored-archive, bootstrap-asset, or prebuilt-native-artifact equivalence decision exists.
No independent clean-host reproduction or owner-reviewed replay acceptance exists.
No dependency, legal, advisory, SBOM, component, compatibility, performance, security, or release-code approval exists.
